title: JUX-327 Married Woman Conductor Train - Lust Hidden In Exposed Uniforms - Nana Aida
overview: Nana, who works for a major railway company, has become a decoy herself as a countermeasure against lewdness and has been cracking down. Nana caught a slut who carelessly approached that day. There, he meets Kazuo, a young man who appears as a witness. I was impressed by his justice-filled actions, but the last word he said, "I like perverts too..." stuck in my heart. A few days later, Kazuo, who I met while commuting, suddenly groped my crotch. Contrary to the feelings of those who resist the sudden action, the body gradually heats up.
